intent: Write a sentiment-heavy report on 'what /f/gaming thinks of in-store peripheral brands' combining storefront listings with forum voice. (1) One Stop Market shopping site — browse the video-games and electronics categories and collect at least 4 peripherals (controller, headset, mouse, cable) noting brands that appear. Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/gaming AND /f/technology for posts that call out specific peripheral brands positively or negatively. Collect at least 3 posts with title, score, comment count. The report must: (a) present the 4 storefront picks with brands highlighted, (b) tag each pick with community sentiment, (c) identify one brand where Reddit and storefront diverge, (d) close with a 'go/no-go' mini-verdict. Cite every claim.
